name: What's the difference between workers comp and personal injury lawsuit in Utah?
description: Comp: no-fault vs. suit: prove negligence.[3]

mainEntity.name: What's the difference between workers comp and personal injury lawsuit in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp: no-fault vs. suit: prove negligence.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp is no-fault for employer injuries; personal injury sues third parties for negligence.** Comp faster, limited payout; suits higher potential.[3][4] Key factors: Comp exclusive for employers; third-party for others. Comp no proof needed; suits require fault. Choose based on cause.
